steps.t: Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Legolas has asked you to invite Gimli to join him in a contest of fortitude at the weddi…
Legolas can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Gimli has politely declined Legolas's invitation. You should return to Legolas.
Bottles of wine can be found in the kitchens of Merethrond. Legolas has asked you to collect bottles of wine in Merethrond.
Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). You have collected ten bottles of wine as Legolas asked. You should now challenge Gimli …
Gimli can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Your challenge seems to have gotten Gimli's attention. You should talk to Gimli.
Legolas can be found in Merethrond in Minas Tirith (Midsummer). Gimli has enthusiastically accepted Legolas's challenge. You should talk to Legolas.
